description: The resistance headquarters. A dimly lit jazz bar that smells of tuna and old leather. Owned by Madame Fluffington, an ancient Persian cat who knows every secret in Neo-Pawsburg. Safe zone — no RoombaCore drones operate here.
A rain-slicked back alley lit by malfunctioning neon signs. RoombaCore patrol drones sweep every 10 minutes. Laser pointer graffiti covers every wall. High encounter chance.
The gleaming corporate headquarters of RoombaCore. 40 floors of brushed steel and vacuum technology. Heavily guarded. Final dungeon area.
A sprawling underground market where cats trade stolen tech, black market tuna, and forged identification chips. Morally grey but mostly safe. Good place to spend CreditChips.
The ancient sewer network beneath Neo-Pawsburg. Smells terrible. Home to feral cats who rejected society and giant mutant rats. Medium danger.
